creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 204896
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support cliqz-1.27.0 builds.

Cliqz has been updated from version 1.26.5 to 1.27.0.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building cliqz-1.27.0.

Notes about the patch

* Removes files/patch-bug1513605 , files/patch-magic__build__and__package.sh since these are no longer applicable to the 1.27.0
* Adds files/patch-bug1554744, Bug 1554744 - make button state in browser language dialog correct when there's no available languages. Borrowed from www/firefox port.
* Now uses "shebangfix" to replace the bash command in magic_build_and_package.sh
* Added MAKE_ENV+=      LLVM_OBJDUMP=${LOCALBASE}/llvm${LLVM_DEFAULT}/bin/llvm-objdump , so the builds do not break in FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE.

It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
